summary: Completed testing of file upload feature: backend POST /api/upload and GET /api/uploads/{filename} endpoints, file size validation (10MB), file type validation, and frontend upload UI. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI elements verified.

issues: Console warning: Invalid HTML nesting span inside tbody/tr - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality (known from iteration 7)
Console warning: Missing DialogDescription (aria-describedby) - minor accessibility warning (known from iteration 7)

backend_upload_images: POST /api/upload?file_type=image - Invalid file type (txt) rejected with 400
backend_upload_documents: POST /api/upload?file_type=document - Invalid file type (exe) rejected with 400
backend_file_size_validation: File over 10MB limit rejected with 413 status code
backend_response_structure: Response contains: url, filename, original_name, size
frontend_teacher_avatar: Avatar section visible in teacher form
frontend_document_upload: URL input for external links available

critical_code_review_comments: File storage is local filesystem (/app/uploads/) - consider cloud storage for production
Security: Directory traversal protection implemented correctly
Unique filenames generated with UUID to prevent collisions
seed_data_creation: Test files uploaded during backend testing (PNG, JPEG, PDF, DOCX, XLSX, ZIP)
context_for_next_testing_agent: File upload feature fully tested. API endpoints: POST /api/upload?file_type=image|document, GET /api/uploads/{filename}. Max file size: 10MB. Allowed image types: .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .gif, .webp. Allowed doc types: .doc, .docx, .xls, .xlsx, .pdf, .zip, .ppt, .pptx. Admin credentials: test_admin@test.ru/test_admin
